payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Partial view of a dark brown three-seat leather sofa with glossy, slightly worn upholstery, visible stitched seams and vertical tufted back cushions; the crop shows the left-to-middle section and is edge-cropped at the right, approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.
